testcase.name: test_admin_get_kyc_applications
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_final_comprehensive.py:241: in test_admin_get_kyc_applications assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get KYC failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get KYC failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_final_comprehensive.py:259: in test_admin_get_audit_logs assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get audit logs failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get audit logs failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_final_comprehensive.py:268: in test_admin_get_overview assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get overview failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get overview failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
